name: Video Studio
description: Programmatic video creation powered by Remotion. Full Studio editor for previewing and editing compositions. Agents create compositions as React code, render videos via CLI, and store results in R2. Includes title cards, kinetic typography, social posts, countdowns, logo reveals, and gradient animations.

deploy.title: Deploy your Video Studio
deploy.subtitle: Programmatic video creation — create compositions as code, render with full CSS fidelity

prompts.label: What kind of videos will you create?
prompts.placeholder: e.g. Social media ads, product demos, YouTube intros
